## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint:py`
- [ ] `npm run format:check:py`
- [ ] `npm run test:py`
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`

## Security

- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added
- [ ] New configuration values documented in `.env.example`
